### Timeline

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Data source identified and documented
- [ ] Data collection methodology defined
- [ ] Data collected and organized
- [ ] Quality review completed
- [ ] Results added to sources.md with full citation
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] Data completeness verified
- [ ] Data accuracy confirmed
- [ ] Proper attribution/citation included
- [ ] File format standardized
- [ ] Metadata documented

## Data Organization
<!-- Where will this data be stored? (e.g., /data/category/) -->
